elements.name: Source
texts: Gibbons, Margaret, Guide to St. Patrick’s Purgatory, Lough Derg, pp. 24-30

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1503 - At request of Archbishop of Armagh Pilgrimage was re-opened by Pope Pius III, who recalled the Bull of Pope Alexander and granted indulgences to the pilgrims, and special faculties to the priests officiating at Lough Derg
